title: EPtotems
description: Resourcepack that adds totems with ElectroPlay players skins to the game
body:
# This project is no longer maintained. Use [Aptissima](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aptissima) by Kantaria instead.

## Adding totems to the game with skins of popular ElectroPlay players

To get a totem with a player's skin, you need to rename the totem on the anvil to the player's nickname.
![totem renaming](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/859886ceade72fa227cbb673588be17e0b76e1bb.gif)

## A list with all the players present can be found [here](https://nedostupn0.github.io/EPtotems/)

### [Cit Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) or Optifine is required
